C:\drive\cmake-4.2.1-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\DataStructureVisualizer.dir/objects.a
C:\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\DataStructureVisualizer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\DataStructureVisualizer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\DataStructureVisualizer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o DataStructureVisualizer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDataStructureVisualizer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\DataStructureVisualizer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
